title: How Influencer Marketing has Evolved over the last 10 Years
description:
👉India’s first ‘learn by doing’ experience for growing your wealth. Imagine being able to build your own personal finance plan while attending a class, live. Apply to this upcoming FREE class this week here on Zerodha Varsity: https://openinapp.link/tsje3

👉By Think School: https://thethinkschool.com/

👉VIDEO INTRODUCTION:

Manish Chowdhary, Co-founder of WOW Skin Science, explains how influencer marketing has evolved, why the era of ‘marketing hacks’ is officially over & why your product is now the only real survival kit.

Watch full podcast on Think School Hindi by Zero 1.
